corporate_income_tax.label: CIT Belgium 2025
corporate_income_tax.notes: CIT 25%; SME first EUR 100k at 20%; VAT 21%/12%/6%; income tax up to 50%

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.
